taste.zh:
## 基础味觉识别训练

### 五味标准训练溶液(1L水中溶解)
| 味觉 | 配方 |
|------|------|
| 甜 | 24g 蔗糖 |
| 酸 | 1.2g 柠檬酸 |
| 咸 | 4g 氯化钠 |
| 苦 | 0.54g 咖啡因 |
| 鲜 | 2g 味精 |

### 进阶强度训练
1. 每种味觉配置4个强度等级
2. 独立品尝->同类混搭->不同类混合->盲喝测试

### 咖啡酸质专项(CQI标准)
- 柠檬酸:柑橘类酸质; 苹果酸:青苹果型; 酒石酸:葡萄型; 醋酸:不愉悦酸; 绿原酸:烘焙中分解为奎宁酸与咖啡酸
taste.en:
## Basic taste recognition training

### Five-taste standard solutions (per 1L water)
| Taste | Recipe |
|------|------|
| Sweet | 24g sucrose |
| Sour | 1.2g citric acid |
| Salty | 4g NaCl |
| Bitter | 0.54g caffeine |
| Umami | 2g MSG |

### Advanced intensity drill
1. 4 intensity levels per taste
2. Solo -> same-class mix -> cross-class mix -> blind test

### Coffee acidity special (CQI)
- Citric: citrus; Malic: green apple; Tartaric: grape; Acetic: unpleasant; Chlorogenic: roasts into quinic & caffeic acids

olfactory.zh:
## 嗅觉记忆建立方法

### 关键认知
常说的「苹果味」并非味觉,而是鼻后嗅觉(retronasal olfaction)。可通过「棒棒糖实验」区分——捏鼻吃水果味棒棒糖只尝到甜味,松鼻瞬间风味明了。

### Le Nez du Cafe 36味闻香瓶(按烘焙化学变化分四群组)
| 群组 | 烘焙阶段 | 香气 | 代表 |
|------|---------|------|------|
| 酶催化 | 浅烘 | 花香果香 | 玫瑰/咖啡花/柠檬/杏桃 |
| 焦糖化 | 中烘 | 坚果焦糖 | 蜂蜜/焦糖/黑巧/烤杏仁 |
| 干馏 | 深烘 | 树脂碳烧 | 丁香/胡椒/烟草/烟熏 |
| 瑕疵 | — | 不愉悦 | 土味/马铃薯/青豆/橡胶 |

### 日常嗅觉记忆
用常见食材建立嗅觉记忆库:水果(柠檬/莓果/桃子)、花香(玫瑰/茉莉)、坚果(杏仁/榛果)、香料(肉桂/丁香/香草)。核心:大量尝试、记住生活气息。
olfactory.en:
## Olfactory memory training

### Key idea
'Apple flavor' is not taste but retronasal olfaction. Try the 'lollipop test': pinch your nose eating a fruit lollipop, you taste only sweet; release and flavor blooms.

### Le Nez du Cafe 36 aromas (by roast chemistry, 4 groups)
| Group | Stage | Aroma | Examples |
|------|-------|-------|---------|
| Enzymatic | light | floral/fruity | rose/coffee blossom/lemon/apricot |
| Sugar browning | medium | nutty/caramel | honey/caramel/dark choc/roasted almond |
| Dry distillation | dark | resinous/burnt | clove/pepper/tobacco/smoky |
| Taints | -- | off | earthy/potato/green bean/rubber |

### Daily olfactory memory
Build a library from everyday foods/fruits/flowers/ nuts/spices. Core: taste widely, remember everyday scents.

cupping.zh:
## 对比品鉴练习

| 训练 | 内容 | 难度递进 |
|------|------|---------|
| 三角杯测 | 三杯两同找不同 | 不同产区->处理法->烘焙度->同农场不同批次 |
| 产区比较 | 对比不同产区 | 先大区,后同区不同国 |
| 瑕疵杯测 | 识别不好风味 | 明显瑕疵->细微瑕疵 |
| 烘焙度对比 | 同豆不同烘焙度 | 理解烘焙影响 |

### 三角杯测方法
1. 三杯咖啡,两杯相同一杯不同
2. 逐一啜吸品鉴,找出不同的那杯
3. 相似度越高越难——从不同产区开始,逐步加难度
cupping.en:
## Comparative tasting

| Drill | What | Progression |
|------|------|-----------|
| Triangle | 3 cups, 2 same, find the odd one | different origin -> process -> roast -> same-farm batch |
| Origin compare | contrast origins | broad region first, then neighbors |
| Defect cupping | spot off-flavors | obvious -> subtle |
| Roast compare | same bean, different roasts | understand roast impact |

### Triangle method
1. Three cups, two identical, one different
2. Slurp each, identify the odd cup
3. Harder as similarity rises — start with different origins

memory.zh:
## 个人化咖啡风味记忆库

### 六步搭建
1. 味觉基础库:配置酸甜咸苦鲜标准溶液,4级强度,反复品尝记忆
2. 鼻后嗅觉库:棒棒糖/新鲜水果盲测,建立鼻后嗅觉与味觉联动记忆
3. 干香湿香库:闻香瓶36味/T100系统训练,辅以日常食材
4. 咖啡风味映射库:杯测品鉴不同产区/处理法/烘焙度,记录并对照风味轮
5. 温度变化库:同一杯在高/中/低温下的风味变化记录
6. 感官卫生维护:戒烟酒辣等刺激物,保持感官灵敏度
memory.en:
## Personal coffee flavor memory bank

### Six steps
1. Taste base bank: sour-sweet-salty-bitter-umami solutions, 4 intensity levels
2. Retronasal bank: lollipop & fruit blind tests
3. Dry/wet aroma bank: 36 aromas / T100 + everyday foods
4. Coffee mapping: cupping across origin/process/roast vs the wheel
5. Temperature bank: same cup at hot/warm/cool
6. Sensory hygiene: cut smoke/alcohol/spicy to keep senses sharp

overview.zh:
## 咖啡感官训练概览

四个模块,建议顺序进行:
1. 基础味觉识别训练 (training_type='taste') - 五味标准溶液+4级强度+咖啡酸质专项
2. 嗅觉记忆建立 (training_type='olfactory') - 鼻后嗅觉+Le Nez du Cafe 36味+日常食材
3. 对比品鉴练习 (training_type='cupping') - 三角杯测+产区比较+瑕疵识别+烘焙度对比
4. 个人风味记忆库 (training_type='memory') - 六步搭建个人化嗅觉与味觉记忆库

### 风味轮使用
从中心向外检索:先确定基本味觉->找所属大类->定位具体描述词
可用 get_flavor_wheel 工具查类别与描述词
overview.en:
## Coffee sensory training overview

Four modules, in order:
1. Taste recognition (training_type='taste') - 5-taste solutions + 4 levels + coffee acids
2. Olfactory memory (training_type='olfactory') - retronasal + 36 aromas + everyday foods
3. Comparative tasting (training_type='cupping') - triangle + origin + defects + roast
4. Personal memory bank (training_type='memory') - six-step personal library

### Flavor wheel use
Search center-out: base taste -> category -> descriptor. Use get_flavor_wheel to query.
